_readme: Edit this file to manage your game library. Each game needs: id (unique number), name, description, category, cover (image URL), url (game file/embed URL or full http(s) link to an external game). Optional: featured (true/false), tags (array of strings, e.g. ['multiplayer','new']). Set 'url' to the path of your game file, or a full https:// link to open it in a new tab instead of the in-site player.
